entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cicer arietinum L. studied for genetic diversity and yield plasticity.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among chickpea genotypes.

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers used for genetic diversity analysis and characterization.

entities.name: PIC
entities.description: Polymorphic Information Content used to measure the informativeness of markers.

entities.name: GENE DIVERSITY
entities.description: The level of genetic variation (HE) within the studied genotypes.

entities.name: SAHN GROUPING
entities.description: Sequential Agglomerative Hierarchical Non-overlapping grouping used for clustering.

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to group genotypes based on genetic diversity, seed type, and pedigree.

entities.name: SEED TYPE
entities.description: A physical characteristic used to distinguish between kabuli and desi genotypes.

entities.name: PEDIGREE
entities.description: The ancestral lineage or parentage of the chickpea genotypes.

entities.name: KABULI
entities.description: A specific type of chickpea genotype characterized by seed type.

entities.name: DESI
entities.description: A specific type of chickpea genotype characterized by seed type.

entities.name: MOLECULAR VARIANCE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to determine genetic variation within and among populations.

entities.name: PCOA
entities.description: Principal coordinate analysis used to divide genotypes into populations based on seed type and pedigree.

entities.name: YIELD PLASTICITY
entities.description: The ability of chickpea genotypes to vary yield in response to different environments.
